title: cyclosorus sophoroides
intro: Cyclosorus sophoroides, also known as the Sophora-leaved Cyclosorus, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus sophoroides include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, the leaves and rhizomes of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
